SELECT event_date, timezone_minute(event_date) AS offset_minutes FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > DATE '1990-01-01';
SELECT (SELECT timezone_minute(MAX(event_date)) FROM test_dates) AS max_offset_minutes, (SELECT MIN(event_date) FROM test_dates) AS min_event_date;
CREATE TABLE timezones (region VARCHAR, utcoffset INT);
SELECT td.event_date, tz.region, timezone_minute(td.event_date) + tz.utcoffset AS total_offset FROM test_dates td JOIN timezones tz ON tz.region = 'UTC';
WITH date_offsets AS (SELECT event_date, timezone_minute(event_date) AS offset_minutes FROM test_dates) SELECT AVG(offset_minutes) FROM date_offsets;
SELECT CASE WHEN timezone_minute(event_date) < 0 THEN 'Negative Offset' ELSE 'Positive Offset' END AS offset_description FROM test_dates;
